---
title: Linear Differential Equations
description: First-order linear differential equations.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Recognize the form of a first-order linear ODE.
- Interpret forcing and decay terms.
- Prepare for numerical solution methods.
:::

First-order linear equations have the form:

```text
dy/dx + p(x)y = q(x)
```

::: {.practice-box}
1. Identify `p(x)` and `q(x)` in `dy/dx + 2y = x`.
2. What does the term involving `y` often represent?
3. Why are linear equations easier than nonlinear ones?
:::
